testCases.query: My hero image loads slowly and LCP is above 4 seconds
expectedBehavior: Adds fetchpriority='high' and loading='eager' to LCP image
Preloads critical resources with link rel='preload'
Server-renders LCP content instead of client-side fetch
References the updated 2026 LCP threshold of 2.0 seconds as the target

testCases.query: Button clicks feel sluggish and INP exceeds 200ms
expectedBehavior: Breaks long tasks into smaller chunks with scheduler.yield for responsiveness
Uses useTransition for non-urgent state updates
Defers heavy computation to idle periods using requestIdleCallback for smoother interaction
References the updated 2026 INP threshold of 150 milliseconds as the target

testCases.query: Page content jumps around during load causing layout shifts
expectedBehavior: Sets explicit width and height attributes on images to reserve layout space
Uses CSS aspect-ratio for responsive containers to prevent layout shifts during load
Configures font-display: optional for non-critical fonts
Uses transform instead of layout-shifting animations

testCases.query: Should I use React.memo everywhere in my React 19 app?
expectedBehavior: Recommends React Compiler as primary approach
Shows how to enable in Next.js 16+ and Expo SDK 54+
Explains Memo badge verification in DevTools
Notes compiler handles components, values, callbacks, and JSX

testCases.query: When do I still need useMemo and useCallback with React Compiler?
expectedBehavior: Lists escape hatches: effect deps, third-party libs, precise control
Shows state colocation to minimize re-renders
Recommends profiling with DevTools before applying any manual optimization techniques
Explains splitting state and dispatch into separate contexts to reduce unnecessary re-renders

testCases.query: My list of 1000 items renders slowly
expectedBehavior: Recommends TanStack Virtual for 100+ items
Shows useVirtualizer setup with estimateSize and overscan
Covers dynamic height measurement for variable-size list items using measureElement
Lists virtualization thresholds: <100 fine, 100-500 consider, 500+ required

testCases.query: How do I lazy load a heavy chart component?
expectedBehavior: Uses React.lazy with dynamic import to load components on demand
Wraps in Suspense with skeleton fallback
Adds error boundary for network failures
Warns against lazy loading above-fold or tiny components

testCases.query: How do I code-split my routes in a React SPA?
expectedBehavior: Shows React Router 7.x lazy route pattern
Configures Vite manualChunks for vendor splitting
Uses granular Suspense boundaries around each lazy-loaded route for isolated loading states
Recommends per-route splitting for most apps

testCases.query: How do I preload the next page before the user clicks?
expectedBehavior: Prefetches route chunks on hover and focus events using onMouseEnter handlers
Uses link rel='modulepreload' for critical chunks
Shows intersection observer for viewport-based loading
Prefetches data with TanStack Query prefetchQuery

testCases.query: How do I optimize images in my Next.js app?
expectedBehavior: Uses next/image with priority for LCP images
Adds blur placeholder via static import
Sets quality to 75-85 for optimal size/quality
Configures remotePatterns in next.config.js to allow optimized loading of external images

testCases.query: Should I use AVIF or WebP for my images?
expectedBehavior: Recommends AVIF as primary (30-50% smaller)
Uses WebP as fallback for broader support
Shows the HTML picture element with source sets for non-Next.js applications
Configures image format preferences in next.config.js for automatic AVIF and WebP delivery

testCases.query: How do I serve different image sizes for mobile vs desktop?
expectedBehavior: Uses sizes prop with breakpoint-based values
Shows art direction with different images per breakpoint
Configures CDN image loaders for Cloudinary or imgix with responsive transformations
Sets deviceSizes and imageSizes in next.config.js

testCases.query: How do I find which React components are re-rendering too often?
expectedBehavior: Uses React DevTools Profiler to record interactions
Identifies high render count and duration in flamegraph
Checks for unnecessary re-renders before optimizing
Measures performance improvement after applying the fix to confirm the optimization worked

testCases.query: My FastAPI server has slow endpoints, how do I profile?
expectedBehavior: Uses py-spy for live profiling without restart
Generates flame graph SVG for visualization
Shows cProfile for detailed function-level analysis
Covers memory_profiler usage for detecting memory leaks in long-running Python processes

testCases.query: My frontend bundle is too large, how do I analyze it?
expectedBehavior: Uses vite-bundle-visualizer or webpack-bundle-analyzer to identify oversized chunks and dependencies
Identifies large dependencies for tree shaking
Sets performance budgets in build config
Shows bundlesize CI integration for automated bundle size regression checks on pull requests

testCases.query: How do I deploy an LLM with vLLM for production?
expectedBehavior: Configures vLLM with tensor parallelism to distribute model layers across multiple GPUs
Enables PagedAttention and continuous batching for efficient GPU memory utilization
Sets gpu_memory_utilization between 0.85 and 0.95 for optimal memory allocation
Enables prefix caching for shared contexts

testCases.query: How do I reduce GPU memory for a 70B parameter model?
expectedBehavior: Recommends AWQ for best 4-bit quality
Shows memory savings: 75% for 4-bit, 50% for 8-bit
Recommends FP8 quantization for H100 and H200 GPUs with native hardware support
Warns about calibration data for GPTQ

testCases.query: How do I speed up LLM text generation?
expectedBehavior: Shows n-gram based speculative decoding configuration for faster token generation
Shows draft model approach for higher quality
Notes a typical 1.5 to 2.5x throughput improvement with speculative decoding enabled
Lists when speculative decoding helps vs hurts
